rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component type ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks with proper syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Use assume and guarantee statements with labels and expressions
Use eq for equations and const for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types like integer or boolean
